mapper.insert: INSERT INTO guestbook (HOST_ID, WRITER_ID, CONTENT) VALUES (#{hostId}, #{writerId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT g.GUESTBOOK_ID AS guestbookId, g.HOST_ID AS hostId, g.WRITER_ID AS writerId, g.CONTENT AS content, g.REG_DATE AS regDate, m.NICKNAME AS writerNickname FROM guestbook g LEFT JOIN member m ON g.WRITER_ID = m.ID WHERE g.HOST_ID = #{HOST_ID} ORDER BY g.REG_DATE DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
